examples: The best argument for efficiency is its cost—or, more precisely, its profitability.
By motivating customers to patronize all three, we will thus contribute to the profitability of each and maximize our return.
Seventy-four percent of the respondents surveyed report a "good to excellent" expectation of real-estate profitability in 2015.
During a credit expansion asset values become inflated, and credit-fueled spending tends to drive up corporate profitability.
Development costs are rising dramatically, and games that aren't big hits struggle to reach profitability.
